languages.text: "Missachtung des Gerichts in den heiligen Hallen des Palastes wurde vermerkt."
languages.original_text: "Contempt of court within the hallowed walls of the Palace has been recorded."

traits.locale_text: "Missachtung des Gerichts in den heiligen Hallen des Palastes wurde vermerkt."

languages.text: « Cet outrage à la cour, commis dans l'enceinte du palais, a été consigné. »
languages.original_text: "Contempt of court within the hallowed walls of the Palace has been recorded."

traits.locale_text: « Cet outrage à la cour, commis dans l'enceinte du palais, a été consigné. »

languages.text: “被告在神圣殿堂内藐视法庭，相关内容已记录在案。”
languages.original_text: "Contempt of court within the hallowed walls of the Palace has been recorded."

traits.locale_text: “被告在神圣殿堂内藐视法庭，相关内容已记录在案。”

languages.text: «Queda registrado el desacato al tribunal en las salas sagradas del Palacio».
languages.original_text: "Contempt of court within the hallowed walls of the Palace has been recorded."

traits.locale_text: «Queda registrado el desacato al tribunal en las salas sagradas del Palacio».

languages.text: 「司法宮の聖なる壁の中での法廷侮辱が記録されました」
languages.original_text: "Contempt of court within the hallowed walls of the Palace has been recorded."

traits.locale_text: 「司法宮の聖なる壁の中での法廷侮辱が記録されました」

languages.text: "Sanığın Kutsal Adalet Sarayı içinde mahkemeyi aşağılaması kayıtlara geçirilmiştir."
languages.original_text: "Contempt of court within the hallowed walls of the Palace has been recorded."

traits.locale_text: "Sanığın Kutsal Adalet Sarayı içinde mahkemeyi aşağılaması kayıtlara geçirilmiştir."
